title: HERSITY Wooden Play Food Toys for Kids Kitchen Pretend Play Set Cutting Fruit and Veg Toys Toddlers Early Learning Gifts for 18 Months 2 3 4 Year Old Boy Girls Childrens
features: Set Cutting Fruit & Vegetables: Set includes 4 vegetables - onion, cucumber, carrot and corn. 4 fruits - banana, lemon, apple and pear. A knife and a storage box(7.08*1.69*4.92in).
Cutting Play Food: All parts stick together well.Kids would love “cutting” the food and putting it back together. The little ones can have fun all day long.

Fun and Educational! : Learning the names, colors, sorting and improving dexterity! It keeps preschoolers entertained for quite a while, and serves as a fun motivator. Is nice for toddler to learn with.

Kitchen Toys Complement: Well made, lots of variety, no barbs to hurt childs hands. The beautiful wooden set is ideal for playing with play kitchens or shopping toys. Making the kitchen role-playing game experience richer.

Perfect Gift for 18+ Month Old: It's a great pretend play food toy for toddlers, preschoolers, boys, girls. Give this wooden cutting food toys as a gift to just about any kid! Keeps childs entertained and busy!
